HOME.DESCRIPTION: I'm a Full-Stack developer passionate about creating solutions that not only meet functional requirements but also deliver exceptional performance and build user trust through stable and secure experiences.

ABOUT.TITLE: About
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Full-Stack Developer
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION_1: I'm a full-stack developer focused on building scalable and well-structured applications. I work with ASP.NET and Next.js, applying DDD, layered architecture, and clean code practices to deliver reliable solutions.
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION_2: Across my projects, I’ve built everything from management platforms and robust APIs to AI-powered solutions. Highlights include InboxIQ (FastAPI + OpenAI), AgileTracker (.NET 9 + DDD for agile management with Scrum/Kanban), and academic projects using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL focused on data visualization and organization.
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION_3: I’m currently a Software Development Intern at ACTI (since 09/2025), working on web systems, database integration, and continuous feature improvements with a focus on performance and quality.

EDUCATION.TITLE: Education
EDUCATION.DESCRIPTION_1: Technology degree course focused on software development, programming, databases, software engineering and project management.
EDUCATION.DESCRIPTION_2: Technical training in programming, web development, databases and computer networks.
EDUCATION.DESCRIPTION_3: I studied English for 3 years of my life, reaching an Intermediate level of English and being able to communicate.

PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Selected projects focused on architecture, scalability, and real-world applications — from APIs and management platforms to AI-powered solutions.
PROJECTS.MINI_4: Academic system with admin & guest area
PROJECTS.MINI_5: Agile management with DDD & robust API
PROJECTS.DESCRIPTION_1: Full stack application for partner registration and management, featuring consistent validations, layered architecture, and secure database persistence.
PROJECTS.DESCRIPTION_2: AI-powered email triage MVP with classification and suggested replies. Supports text/file analysis, Gmail integration, and a production-ready architecture approach.
PROJECTS.DESCRIPTION_3: Portfolio built with a focus on modern UI, responsiveness, smooth animations, and well-structured content to showcase projects and professional experience.
PROJECTS.DESCRIPTION_4: Full stack solution for academic management with an admin area and public guest access, integrating authentication, database persistence, and real-time updates.
PROJECTS.DESCRIPTION_5: Agile management platform combining Scrum and Kanban with a focus on traceability, modularity, and scalability. DDD-based structure with standardized endpoints and clear business rules.
PROJECTS.DESCRIPTION_6: Web platform for consulting and visualizing limnological data with filters by time, location, and scientific variables, providing analysis through tables, charts, and reports.
PROJECTS.DESCRIPTION_7: Professional Web POS system designed to modernize commercial operations with dashboards, KPIs, reports, and sales-focused features, prioritizing performance and scalability.

CONTACTS.TITLE: Contacts
CONTACTS.DESCRIPTION_1: Contact us by email to discuss projects, professional opportunities or collaborations.
CONTACTS.DESCRIPTION_2: I'm available for quick conversations and to discuss projects. Please contact me via WhatsApp.
CONTACTS.DESCRIPTION_3: Connect with me on LinkedIn to follow my professional career and exchange experiences.
CONTACTS.DESCRIPTION_4: Explore my repositories and open source projects. Contributions and collaborations are always welcome!
